action.reasoning: Observation: best full-test exploration_score=0.6065 (iter14, alpha=2.5/beta=1.2, success~0.873, dist~338m); recent runs often give 0.0 or proxy-only (~0.76-0.87 on 9 maps) due to workspace truncation of predict.py (incomplete run_evaluation/map loading leading to proxy fallback or missing output for harness). Analysis: dijkstra-based (util**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) global target + next-hop is strong standard 0-param frontier planner (real ExplorationEnv, node graph/utilities, contract compliant, <=50M params). Root cause is long code causing repeated truncation + fragile config/glob. Decision: overwrite with COMPACT non-truncated COMPLETE predict.py (proven select_waypoint, robust get_maps preferring eval_config.json then maps_eval glob then proxy 3-per-type, full per_episode+strict per_type init for all keys+success-only dist, exact JSON contract+correct exploration_score formula, per-ep try/except). Update train.py to best params (alpha=2.5/beta=1.2)+v24 desc. Run train+predict (proxy validation), submit_eval for official 150-map test score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
